mapper.sql: id, correction_id, question_no, question_content, student_answer, correct_answer, is_correct, analysis, source_image, review_status, review_result, review_answer, review_analysis, reviewed_by, review_time, sort, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_homework_question WHERE id IN #{id}
SELECT FROM edu_homework_question WHERE correction_id = #{correctionId} ORDER BY question_no ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO edu_homework_question (correction_id, question_no, question_content, student_answer, correct_answer, is_correct, analysis, source_image, review_status, sort, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.correctionId}, #{item.questionNo}, #{item.questionContent}, #{item.studentAnswer}, #{item.correctAnswer}, #{item.isCorrect}, #{item.analysis}, #{item.sourceImage}, 0, #{item.sort}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalQuestions, SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correctCount, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewedCount FROM edu_homework_question WHERE correction_id = #{correctionId}
